title: oldenlandia pellucida var. echinulosa
intro: Oldenlandia pellucida var. echinulosa, also known as the echinulose oldenlandia, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, which is native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Oldenlandia pellucida var. echinulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and promote urination, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
